newsitems.title: Welcome to Very Safe Dino Park
newsitems.author: Opal
newsitems.contents: Hey Rangers 🦖, Welcome to Very Safe Dino Park! Announcement trailer below.What is Very Safe Dino Park?A chaotic 1 to 4 player dinosaur park sim where feeding the dinos, cleaning the mess, and surviving the chaos are all part of the job.What are the key features?Step into enclosures to feed and manage themClean up mountains of poopSell tickets and overpriced merchKeep vending machines stockedClean up litter, spills, and suspicious limbsDeal with troublemakers however you see fitScrub bloodstains and mystery puddlesKeep the park cleanTurn dino poop into biofuelKeep the power on at all costsUnlock new dinosaursBuild enclosuresAdd facilities and decorationsAutomate repetitive tasksWe hope you are excited for Very Safe Dino Park. We can't wait to show you what the team has been up to! Until then, see you in the park,Panic Stations 💚
